title: Executive Order 12541—Amending Executive Order 11157 as It Relates to a Basic Allowance for Quarters While on Sea Duty

flags.justification: A narrow, technical, definitional amendment to a military housing-allowance regulation.
Single purpose: defining 'sea duty' for benefit-eligibility purposes.
The amendment adds specificity (excluding duty under three months and certain temporary-orders duty), reducing rather than increasing ambiguity.
A pure definitional and benefits amendment with no third-party compliance regime.
A standing military compensation regulation, evergreen by nature.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No third-party compliance regime is created.
A narrow, technical amendment; no broad authority claim.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
